name: session-report-claude-plugins-public
description: Generate an explorable HTML report of Claude Code session usage (tokens, cache, subagents, skills, expensive prompts) from ~/.claude/projects transcripts.
intent_triggers: use the session report agent skill
run a workflow for session report
我需要處理 session report 相關工作
幫我啟用 session report 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 session report

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the session report skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
